title: NYK Begins Continuous Use of Bio-LNG Fuel on Car Carriers
content: As part of its commitment to realizing a decarbonized society, NYK has commenced the continuous use of bio-LNG fuel on its LNG-powered car carriers. The bio-LNG is supplied by Titan Supply B.V. (Titan)* at the port of Zeebrugge in Belgium. The first vessel to receive the fuel was Daisy Leader on June 15, and the second was Sumire Leader on July 18. NYK has long been at the forefront of efforts to decarbonize the shipping industry through the operation of LNG-fueled vessels and usage of biofuel. In November 2023, the NYK Group Decarbonization Story  was released, outlining the goal of achieving net-zero GHG emissions by 2050.
